sections.heading: Inthis Order, unless the context otherwise requires— Interpretation
sections.text:
“licence holder” means the licence holder specified in the
Second Schedule to this order; and
“special economic zone” has the meaning assigned to the
words in the Act.

9th May, 2025 Statutory Instruments 135
FIRST SCHEDULE
(Paragraph 3)
The parcel of land comprising the Fintech City Multi-Facility Zone is as follows:
All that piece of land in extent 230 hectares more or less being Farm No. 2062 situate in
Chongwe District in the Lusaka Province of Zambia which Piece of land is more particularly
delineated and described in Diagram No. 1904 of 1998 annexed to the Certificate of Title
relating to the said piece of land together with all unexhausted improvements thercon except
and reserved all minerals, oils and precious stones whatsoever upon or under the said piece of
land.
